options.name: --table
options.description: Required. What table you want a report from.

options.name: --columns
options.description: Required. What table you want a report from.

options.name: --where
options.description: The additional where clause to add to the select statement.

options.name: --output
options.description: (Default: out.xlsx) Name of the output file

options.name: --delete
options.description:
(Default: false) If the program should remove an existing output
file or append to it instead.
